name: Beef Stroganoff (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb sirloin steak, boneless, sliced into thin strips
2 cups hot cooked rice or noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir oil and meat in a 2-quart casserole until beef is coated.
2. Cover and microwave on high (100%) until meat is no longer pink, 4 to 5 minutes. Remove meat from casserole; reserve meat and juices.
3. Add mushrooms and onion to meat juices. Cover and microwave until mushrooms are tender, 5 to 6 minutes.
4. Shake water and flour in a tightly covered jar; stir into mushrooms.
5. Sprinkle with dry mustard, salt, and pepper. Microwave uncovered to boiling, 30 seconds. Boil until thickened, 1 minute.
6. Stir in reserved meat, then sour cream. Microwave uncovered until hot, about 1 minute. Serve over hot cooked rice or hot cooked noodles.
